text:
Undertaking to take out and maintain a life assurance policy

The [respondent] / [applicant] shall [forthwith] / [by [time] on the date [number] days from the date of this order] [use [his] / [her] best endeavours to] take out with [company name] / [a reputable United Kingdom insurance company] a policy of assurance on [his] / [her] life for the benefit of the child[ren] of the family [for a term of [number] years] / [for the whole of [his] / [her] life] / [to mature on [date]] / [for the duration of the subsistence of the order for periodical payments at paragraph [para number] below in respect of [him] / [her] / [them]] [in the sum of £[amount] [[with] / [without] profits] / [in the sum of £[amount] [reducing on a straight line basis by annual increments to £0 by the end of the term]] / [in such sum as shall pay out £[amount] per annum, [RPI] / [CPI]-index-linked, from the date of [his] / [her] death until the cessation of the order for periodical payments at paragraph [para number] below in respect of [him] / [her] / [them]], and shall provide the [applicant] / [respondent] with written evidence that [he] / [she] has done so.
